cm-4.title: Impact Analyses
cm-4.implementation: Analyze security impact before changes. Use Config to track configuration changes. Test changes in non-production first. Use CloudFormation change sets to preview impacts. Document impact analysis procedures. Review high-impact changes with security team.

cm-9.title: Configuration Management Plan
cm-9.implementation: Document configuration management procedures. Use Config for baseline tracking. Implement CloudFormation for infrastructure as code. Use Systems Manager for configuration enforcement. Define change control process. Review plan annually.

cm-10.title: Software Usage Restrictions
cm-10.implementation: Document approved software list. Use Systems Manager to inventory installed software. Create Config rules for unauthorized software. Use License Manager to track licenses. Implement software allow-listing. Monitor with Inspector.

cm-11.title: User-installed Software
cm-11.implementation: Restrict user ability to install software. Use Systems Manager to control installations. Provide approved software via AppStream. Implement least privilege for installations. Monitor unauthorized installations with Config. Document approval process.

cm-12.title: Information Location
cm-12.implementation: Use Macie to discover sensitive data locations. Tag resources with data classification. Document where sensitive data resides. Implement geographic restrictions if needed. Use S3 inventory for data location tracking. Review data locations quarterly.

cp-3.title: Contingency Training
cp-3.implementation: Train personnel on DR procedures. Conduct DR exercises using CloudFormation. Practice failover procedures. Train on backup restoration. Document training completion. Conduct training annually. Test DR plans during training.

ia-6.title: Authentication Feedback
ia-6.implementation: Implement generic error messages for failed authentication. Don't reveal whether username or password was incorrect. Use Cognito with secure feedback. Avoid account enumeration. Implement rate limiting. Document authentication feedback standards.

mp-7.title: Media Use
mp-7.description: Restrict use of certain types of media
mp-7.implementation: Define approved media types. Restrict USB access on WorkSpaces. Use AppStream for controlled application access. Implement DLP policies. Monitor media usage with CloudTrail. Document media use policies.

pl-1.title: Planning Policy and Procedures
pl-1.implementation: Document security planning procedures. Define system authorization process. Establish security architecture requirements. Store policies in S3 with versioning. Review policies annually. Communicate policies to stakeholders.

pl-11.title: Baseline Tailoring
pl-11.implementation: Document baseline tailoring decisions. Justify control modifications. Use Security Hub with custom standards. Implement tailored controls with Config rules. Document compensating controls. Review tailoring annually.

ps-9.title: Position Descriptions
ps-9.description: Incorporate security roles in position descriptions
ps-9.implementation: Define security responsibilities in job descriptions. Document required security training by role. Map positions to IAM roles. Store position descriptions in S3. Include security clearance requirements. Review descriptions annually.

ra-7.title: Risk Response
ra-7.description: Respond to findings from security assessments
ra-7.implementation: Establish risk response procedures. Use Security Hub for findings management. Create OpsItems for remediation. Define risk acceptance criteria. Document risk decisions. Track remediation with Systems Manager. Review risks quarterly.

ra-9.title: Criticality Analysis
ra-9.implementation: Identify mission-critical systems and data. Tag critical resources. Document dependencies. Use Config to track critical resources. Implement enhanced monitoring for critical systems. Review criticality quarterly.

sc-2.title: Separation of System and User Functionality
sc-2.implementation: Separate management and data planes. Use dedicated VPCs for management. Implement separate IAM roles for admin vs user functions. Use Organizations for account separation. Document separation architecture.

sc-4.title: Information in Shared Resources
sc-4.implementation: Encrypt data at rest with KMS. Use dedicated EBS volumes per tenant. Implement S3 bucket policies for isolation. Clear memory after use. Use encryption for data in transit. Document data isolation procedures.

sc-17.title: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
sc-17.implementation: Use Certificate Manager for public certificates. Use Private CA for internal PKI. Implement certificate lifecycle management. Monitor certificate expiration with CloudWatch. Automate certificate renewal. Document PKI procedures.

sc-18.title: Mobile Code
sc-18.description: Define acceptable and unacceptable mobile code
sc-18.implementation: Define mobile code policies (JavaScript, Java applets). Use WAF to control mobile code. Implement Content Security Policy headers. Use Lambda@Edge for code inspection. Document approved mobile code. Review policies annually.

sc-22.title: Architecture for Name/Address Resolution
sc-22.implementation: Use Route 53 with multiple name servers. Implement Route 53 Resolver for VPC DNS. Use health checks for failover. Deploy across multiple regions. Enable DNSSEC. Document DNS architecture.

sc-39.title: Process Isolation
sc-39.implementation: Use Lambda for isolated function execution. Use Fargate for container isolation. Implement EC2 with separate security groups. Use separate VPCs for isolation. Document isolation architecture.

si-12.title: Information Management and Retention
si-12.implementation: Define retention policies by data type. Use S3 lifecycle policies for automated retention. Use Glacier for long-term archival. Implement S3 Object Lock for compliance. Use AWS Backup for retention management. Document retention schedules.

sr-6.title: Supplier Assessments
sr-6.implementation: Review AWS Marketplace vendor security. Request vendor security documentation. Review AWS Artifact for AWS compliance. Conduct vendor security assessments. Document assessment results. Review vendors annually.

sr-8.title: Notification Agreements
sr-8.implementation: Establish notification procedures with vendors. Use SNS for vendor notifications. Implement EventBridge for automated notifications. Document notification requirements in contracts. Test notification procedures. Review agreements annually.

sr-10.title: Inspection of Systems
sr-10.description: Inspect systems and components for tampering
sr-10.implementation: Use Inspector for vulnerability scanning. Monitor for unauthorized changes with Config. Use Systems Manager for integrity checking. Review CloudTrail for suspicious activity. Implement file integrity monitoring. Conduct inspections quarterly.
